annotation_record.business_purpose: Tracks annotations made on various objects.

change_request.business_purpose: Records requests for changes to objects.

checklist.business_purpose: Tracks completion status of various checks or tasks.

checklist_template.business_purpose: Stores the templates for checklists used in various processes.

comment.business_purpose: Records comments made by editors on various entities like incidents.

counterparty_details.business_purpose: Stores detailed information about counterparties used in transactions.

counterparty_supplementary_info.business_purpose: Stores additional information about counterparties for financial transactions.
counterparty_supplementary_info.primary_entity: A counterparty (e.g., a business or individual) involved in financial dealings.

dashboard_items.business_purpose: Defines individual items that can be displayed on various dashboards to monitor and analyze data.
dashboard_items.primary_entity: An item that represents a specific piece of data or metric shown on a dashboard.

dashboards.business_purpose: Tracks all the dashboards used for monitoring and analyzing data within the organization.
dashboards.primary_entity: A dashboard that groups together multiple items to provide an overview of specific aspects of the business or system.

document_category_master.business_purpose: Stores the categories into which documents can be classified.

document_ingestion_registry.business_purpose: Tracks the ingestion of documents by tenants, including their status and paths.

document_tag_mapping.business_purpose: Associates documents with tags for categorization and filtering.

document_tags.business_purpose: To categorize documents with various tags for easy searching and filtering.
document_tags.primary_entity: A tag associated with a document.

document_type_master.business_purpose: To define various types of documents, including their characteristics and categorization.

documents.business_purpose: To store metadata and details about individual documents in the system.

external_users.business_purpose: Stores information about external users of a system.
external_users.primary_entity: An external user of the system.

feature.business_purpose: Stores information about different features available in a system.

group.business_purpose: Stores information about groups within a system, including their membership and attributes.

incident.business_purpose: Records details of incidents including their status, reason, investigation status, and outcomes.

incident_signal_score.business_purpose: Stores the signal scores and total scores for incidents, capturing various signals related to parties and transactions.
incident_signal_score.primary_entity: Signal score record for an incident

investigation_and_research_counter_party.business_purpose: Tracks the details of counter-parties involved in investigations, including their status and ownership.

level.business_purpose: Stores information about different levels or categories.

ml_predictions.business_purpose: Stores the results of machine learning predictions.
ml_predictions.primary_entity: A single prediction result from a machine learning model.

ml_use_case.business_purpose: Stores information about different machine learning use cases.
ml_use_case.primary_entity: A specific machine learning use case.

module.business_purpose: Stores information about different modules or features within an application.
module.primary_entity: A module or feature within the application.

notification.business_purpose: Records notifications sent out by the system, including details about when they were created and their type.
notification.primary_entity: A notification sent by the system.

organizations.business_purpose: Stores information about different organizations within the system, including approval status and description.

party_research.business_purpose: Stores information about research conducted by parties.
party_research.primary_entity: A single piece of research conducted by a party.

password_policy.business_purpose: Defines the rules and conditions for password management in the system.

password_rule.business_purpose: Contains the specific rules that define a password policy.
password_rule.primary_entity: A single rule within a password policy.

password_security_questions.business_purpose: Stores security questions and their details for user password recovery.

permission.business_purpose: Defines different types of permissions that can be assigned to users or roles within the system.

research_type.business_purpose: Categorizes different types of research projects or studies available within the system.
research_type.primary_entity: A single type of research project.

rfi_comments.business_purpose: Stores comments made on RFI objects throughout their lifecycle.
rfi_comments.primary_entity: A comment associated with an RFI object.

rfi_instance_questions.business_purpose: Stores questions related to RFI instances, including custom questions and their responses.
rfi_instance_questions.primary_entity: A question associated with an RFI instance.

rfi_objects.business_purpose: Tracks the lifecycle and details of RFI objects, including their workflow state and submission information.

rfi_questions.business_purpose: Stores the questions related to Request for Information (RFI) processes.
rfi_questions.primary_entity: An individual question within an RFI process.

rfi_responses.business_purpose: Stores the responses provided to questions in Request for Information (RFI) processes.
rfi_responses.primary_entity: A response to a specific RFI question.

rfi_templates.business_purpose: Stores templates for Request for Information (RFI) processes, including default and active status.
rfi_templates.primary_entity: A template for RFI questions and responses.

role.business_purpose: Stores information about different roles within an organization.

role_permissions.business_purpose: Stores the permissions associated with each role.
role_permissions.primary_entity: The association between a role and its permissions.

rule.business_purpose: Stores information about different rules that can be applied in the system.

sampling.business_purpose: Tracks the sampling process with various parameters and metadata.
sampling.primary_entity: A specific instance of a sampling event or process.

signal_assignments.business_purpose: Assigns signals to entities based on various factors and weights.
signal_assignments.primary_entity: A specific signal assignment for an entity.

signal_categories.business_purpose: Defines categories of signals used in various applications.

signal_levels.business_purpose: Defines the levels or thresholds for signals in various tables.
signal_levels.primary_entity: A signal level associated with a target table and primary key.

signal_rules.business_purpose: Stores rules that define how signals are calculated based on specific conditions and queries.
signal_rules.primary_entity: A rule for calculating a signal with its metadata and details.

signal_score_assignments.business_purpose: Tracks the assignments of scores to objects based on signals, including total scores and counts.
signal_score_assignments.primary_entity: An assignment of a score to an object with details about the signal used.

signal_typologies.business_purpose: Stores different types of signals used for communication.

sla_config.business_purpose: Configures Service Level Agreements (SLAs) with various parameters such as workflow state, hours, and reminder intervals.

sla_instance.business_purpose: Tracks individual instances of Service Level Agreements (SLAs) including their status and reminders sent.

sla_scheduled_action.business_purpose: Tracks scheduled actions for database objects related to Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
sla_scheduled_action.primary_entity: A scheduled action for a specific database object.

state.business_purpose: Stores the different states and their properties in the system, such as initial, final, processes, etc.
state.primary_entity: A state in the system with its properties.

tenant_info.business_purpose: Stores information about tenants or users, including key-value pairs and JSON values.
tenant_info.primary_entity: Information about a tenant or user.

transition.business_purpose: Records details of state transitions in a process or system.

user.business_purpose: Stores information about users in the system.

user_groups.business_purpose: Tracks the groups to which users belong.

user_permissions.business_purpose: Stores permissions assigned to individual users, possibly overriding default settings.

user_profile.business_purpose: Stores detailed information about individual users.

user_prompt.business_purpose: Stores user prompts and their metadata.
user_prompt.primary_entity: A specific prompt created by a user.

user_roles.business_purpose: Tracks user roles and their associations with specific users.
user_roles.primary_entity: A role associated with a user.

user_security_question.business_purpose: Stores security questions and answers for users.
user_security_question.primary_entity: A security question answered by a user.

user_user_permissions.business_purpose: Stores the permissions assigned to each user.

workflow.business_purpose: Describes the workflows available in the system with details like name, model, and description.
